scripts.package:check: node scripts/check-package-contracts.mjs && pnpm test:cli:lib && node --test scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:dogfood: node --test --test-name-pattern "structuredContent|compile_ontology|row-label guidance|vault warnings|validate_vault problem|unhealthy first-contact|failing health checks|warn/fail next actions|malformed workspace_brief|malformed maintenance_plan payloads|remaining maintenance buckets|current-page maintenance next actions|stderr warnings|dogfood help|dogfood arguments|dogfood timeout|timeout failures|dogfood response labels|destructive dogfood dry-run|strict relation filters|malformed initialize|dogfood MCP docs explicit" scripts/dogfood-mcp-walk.test.mjs scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:dogfood:timeout: node --test --test-name-pattern "dogfood timeout|timeout failures|dogfood response labels|dogfood help" scripts/dogfood-mcp-walk.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:docs: node --test --test-name-pattern "README|dogfood CLI capability|dogfood MCP docs|dogfood MCP capability|filtered integration scripts" scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:maintenance: node --test --test-name-pattern "maintenance filter|maintenance cursor|maintenance missing-cursor|maintenance ready-cursor|maintenance resume-cursor|malformed maintenance_plan payloads|remaining maintenance buckets|current-page maintenance next actions" mcp/src/verify-script.test.mjs scripts/dogfood-mcp-walk.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:package: node --test --test-name-pattern "MCP npm test|CLI npm test|allows only the parser smoke fixture|CLI MCP dependency" scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:suggestions: node --test --test-name-pattern "suggestions|suggests close enum values" mcp/src/suggestions.test.mjs mcp/src/ontology-engine.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:verify:first-contact: node --test --test-name-pattern "initialize instructions|first-contact response labels|bootstrap and import-analysis|first-contact verify|list_concepts reports vault warnings|validate_vault reports problem files|malformed validate_vault|first-contact diagnosis|health summary|health check advisories|failing health checks|workspace_brief growth count drift|workspace_brief next action sample drift|fail next actions" mcp/src/verify-script.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:verify:timeout: node --test --test-name-pattern "verify timeout|timeout failures|startup failures|direct verify usage|direct verify timeout|direct verify CLI args" mcp/src/verify-script.test.mjs
